prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Mercedes-Benz FO110M 3.0L V10 (engine code: M291)** with a **Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA** twin-turbo conversion, utilizing **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegates** and **HKS SSQV4 blow-off valves** for 1,200+ hp at 1.8 bar boost, paired with a **Pectel SQ6M ECU** running **McLaren F1-derived fuel mapping** and **Motec M150 data logging** for real-time telemetry.

Install **Ohlins TTX40 MkII coilovers** with **McLaren MP4-14-derived pushrod geometry**, **Eibach 1,200 lb/in springs**, and **Tillet B12 carbon fiber monocoque stiffening inserts** to reduce chassis flex by 38% under 5G cornering loads, while integrating **AP Racing CP8470-4S carbon-ceramic brakes** with **Ferodo DS4000 pads** for 1,500°C heat resistance.

Replace the stock **Xtrac P721 6-speed sequential transaxle** with a **Ricardo 7-speed semi-automatic** (as used in the **McLaren P1**), featuring **AP Racing carbon triple-plate clutch**, **Hewland LSD with 75% lock**, and **Castrol Transmax Z 75W-140** fluid for sustained 1,100 Nm torque handling, paired with a **Quaife ATB differential** for launch control optimization.
estetica: Fit a **Liberty Walk LB-MP4/13 widebody kit** with **3D-printed titanium wheel arches** (weight savings of 4.2 kg per side) and **Vorsteiner carbon fiber side skirts** featuring **integrated LED brake cooling ducts**, all finished in **McLaren Papaya Spark (M720S-derived) matte vinyl wrap** with **3M Scotchlite reflective pinstriping**.

Install **Dymag RB1 carbon fiber wheels** (18x12 front, 18x14 rear) with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (325/645R18)**, wrapped in **BBS LM-style titanium wheel bolts**, and **AeroCatch carbon fiber quick-release hood latches** for rapid engine bay access, complemented by a **RML Group F1-style rear wing** with **active Gurney flaps** (adjustable via **McLaren’s proprietary hydraulic actuators**).

Replace the stock **Sparco Monaco II seats** with **Recaro Pole Position carbon-Kevlar buckets** (weighing 8.5 kg each), upholstered in **Bridge of Weir leather with Alcantara suede inserts**, featuring **Schroth 6-point harnesses** and **Sabelt HANS-compatible head restraints**, while the dashboard is retrofitted with a **Cosworth IQ3 digital display** and **McLaren F1-style gearshift paddles (magnesium construction)** for tactile feedback.
